html:
Shin Godzilla vs.
Evangelion Symphony
Publisher
  • Japan King Records
Release Date
  • Japan December 27, 2017
Media Type Audio CD
Author Shiro Sagisu

Shin Godzilla vs. Evangelion Symphony is a live performance by the Tokyo Philharmonic Orchestra combining the soundtracks of Evangelion and Hideaki Anno's film Shin Godzilla, both scored by Shiro Sagisu. It was released by King Record Co., Ltd. on December 27, 2017 with catalog number KICA-2522.

Track Listing[edit]

All music composed by Shirō Sagisu unless otherwise noted.

Shin Godzilla vs. Evangelion Symphony (CD1)
No. TitleComposerVocals Length
1. "Persecution of the Masses (1172)"   5:36
2. "Contre Les Agressions(EM04A)～Showdown(EM05_A) (medley)"   4:22
3. "Angel of Doom (EM21)"   3:47
4. "Les Bêtes(EM05_B～2EM29_ E5)～Instabilité orchestre(KK_A08) (medley)"   8:29
5. "11174_rhythm～Black Angels(Fob_10_1211) (medley)"   4:18
6. "Operation Taba (Fob_ 01)"   7:21
7. "Defeat is No Option (1197)"   4:17
8. "Who Will Know OST"  Yoko Takahashi3:26
9. "Early Morning from Tokyo～EM20_alterna01～EM20_alterna03～EM20_alterna04 (bonus medley)"   4:49
10. "Akira Ifukube Tribute Part 1: Godzilla Lands~Godzilla Revives~Godzilla Appears" (from "Godzilla", "King Kong vs. Godzilla" and "Terror of Mechagodzilla")Akira Ifukube 6:51
Total length:53:21
Shin Godzilla vs. Evangelion Symphony (CD2)
No. TitleComposerVocals Length
1. "The Final Decision We All Must Take (0902)"   4:25
2. "Cruel Dilemme (EM09A)～Des Cordes(KK_C01) (medley)"   5:21
3. "God's Message(C17)～Dark Defender(C16)～The Anthem(C15) (medley)"   8:40
4. "It Will Mean Victory(SD2_ 01)～The Wrath of God in All Its Fury(Nu09) (medley)"   6:22
5. "Under a Burning Sky (11174)"   2:41
6. "Final (Omni_00)"   3:45
7. "Sin From Genesis E16〜EM20～EM10_Q～EM20 (medley)"   8:46
8. "Akira Ifukube Tribute Part 2: Great War of the Universe~Godzilla Title" (from "Battle in Outer Space" and "Godzilla")Akira Ifukube 6:30
9. "Who will know – furusato"  Yoko Takahashi4:15
10. "A Cruel Angel's Thesis ～MISATO～Jikai Yokoku F02～Jikai Yokoku F02 (Encore)"  Yoko Takahashi12:13
Total length:63:03

Soundtrack Albums: Neon Genesis Evangelion OST I | Neon Genesis Evangelion OST II | Neon Genesis Evangelion OST III | Evangelion Death | End of Evangelion | S² Works | Music from Evangelion: 1.0 You Are (Not) Alone | Evangelion: 1.0 You Are (Not) Alone Original Soundtrack | Evangelion: 2.0 You Can (Not) Advance Original Soundtrack | Music from Evangelion: 3.0 You Can (Not) Redo | Evangelion: 3.0 You Can (Not) Redo Original Soundtrack | Music from "Shin Evangelion" Evangelion: 3.0+1.0

summary: Shin Godzilla vs. Evangelion Symphony is a live performance by the Tokyo Philharmonic Orchestra combining the soundtracks of Evangelion and Hideaki Anno's film Shin Godzilla, both scored by Shiro Sagisu. It was released by King Record Co., Ltd. on December 27, 2017 with catalog number KICA-2522.

Shin Godzilla vs. Evangelion Symphony is a live performance by the Tokyo Philharmonic Orchestra combining the soundtracks of Evangelion and Hideaki Anno's film Shin Godzilla, both scored by Shiro Sagisu. It was released by King Record Co., Ltd. on December 27, 2017 with catalog number KICA-2522.
